## Summary

Align the ZCore **dapp** (`Front/`) visual design with the **Zcore-Landing** marketing site: monochrome ZK aesthetic (black/white, Space Mono, `zk-slash` cards), shared logo, and consistent typography — replacing the earlier indigo/violet theme.

---

## Background

ZCore split into two repos:
- **Zcore-Landing** — marketing (`zcore-landing.vercel.app`)
- **ZCore-dev / Front** — product dapp (`dapp-zcore.vercel.app`)

Users expect visual continuity from landing → dapp. The original dapp used `#080B14` + indigo accents; landing uses pure black/white ZK proof branding.

---

## Implementation (completed)

**Design tokens:** `Front/app/globals.css`
- CSS variables: `--background`, `--foreground`, ZK spacing, animations (`zk-ring-spin`, `zk-slide-up`, etc.)
- Monochrome palette, gradient text, glow effects

**Components updated/added:**
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `Front/components/dapp-shell.tsx` | Shared layout wrapper with optional grid |
| `Front/components/zcore-logo.tsx` | Logo component |
| `Front/public/logo_name.png` | Asset from landing |
| `Front/components/ui/button.tsx` | ZK button variants, `glow-white` |
| `Front/components/ui/card.tsx` | `zk-slash` border styling |
| `Front/components/dashboard-nav.tsx` | Sticky nav, mobile menu |
| `Front/components/network-badge.tsx` | Testnet/mainnet badge |
| `Front/app/layout.tsx` | Space Mono + Inter fonts, dark mode |

**Pages restyled:** `/`, `/login`, `/register`, `/dashboard/*`

---

## How to verify

```bash
cd Front && npm run dev   # port 3001
```

1. Compare side-by-side with https://zcore-landing.vercel.app
2. Check: black background, white/gray text hierarchy, uppercase `tracking-zk` labels
3. Mobile: dashboard nav hamburger works
4. Logo renders on intro, login, register, dashboard nav

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] No indigo/violet primary accents remain
- [x] `logo_name.png` used in dapp
- [x] Typography matches landing (Space Mono display)
- [x] All dashboard routes use `DappShell` + consistent cards

---

- #22 — landing CTA must point to `dapp-zcore.vercel.app`
- Intro splash (#51d02b3 commit) extends ZK animation language

- Shared npm design package between landing and dapp
